name: PostgreSQL Connector
description: Connect to PostgreSQL databases for Change Data Capture (CDC), query-based ingestion, or batch data extraction. Supports logical replication for real-time streaming.

entity.name: PostgreSQL
entity.description: PostgreSQL database connector with CDC and query-based ingestion support

connection_string.help: Optional postgres:// URL; with resolution flexible, passed to pg as connectionString when set.

host.help: Discrete host when not using connection_string.

username.help: Also accepted on connector credentials; required for non-localhost discrete mode.

cdc.help: JSON object: enabled, replication_slot, publication, plugin (pgoutput|test_decoding|wal2json).

tables.help: JSON string array of table names to include (inbound filter).

pg_pool_options.help: Optional pg Pool keys safelisted in runtime (max, connectionTimeoutMillis, application_name, …).

table.help: Outbound: destination table name for pushData when set with other dest fields.

primary_key.help: JSON string array of PK columns for upsert.

update_columns.help: JSON string array of columns to update on upsert.

column_mapping.help: JSON object map source→dest column names.

connection_config_spec.help: Use either a single connection_string for the driver or discrete host/database/credentials; optional pg_pool_options merges into the pg Pool (safelisted keys only).

placeholders.{{DB_USERNAME}}: Database username with SELECT and REPLICATION permissions
placeholders.{{REPLICATION_SLOT}}: Logical replication slot name for CDC

connector_package.description: A connector is a connection to a third party (here: your Postgres); actions describe operations once a native action runner exists.
follow_up_notes: Runtime: platform PostgresConnector (native) — CDC, replication, and SQL paths are not expressible as catalog_http_*; do not set use_catalog_runtime for this connector until a dedicated DB runtime exists.
custom_settings_schema documents PostgresConnectorCustomSettings for UX/docs; runtime validation is in platform TypeScript.
connector_package.actions use execution.protocol platform_native (not catalog_http_*); dispatcher TBD.
